name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-9
title: agents/tdd-subagent.md references agent-local scripts/tdd-step.py with confusing path note
description: agents/tdd-subagent.md (line 24-27) says scripts are at 'scripts/tdd-step.py (agent-local, relative to .claude/agents/tdd-subagent/)' OR '.claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/'. This dual-path advice is confusing because the dispatched prompt always uses the absolute feature path (computed by dispatch-tdd-subagent.py); the subagent never needs to resolve the agent-local copy. Either remove the dual-path text or explicitly say 'use whichever absolute path the prompt provides'.
